Functions
fza_light_fnc_handleControl
Description

Handles any light-related cockpit controls.

Parameters
_heli

The helicopter to act on

_system

the name of the system that the touched control belongs to

_control

the name of the control that has been touched

Returns

Nothing

Examples
[_heli, "light", "floodlight"] call_lightHandleControl
Author

Snow(Dryden)
